data.name: Casino Of Desire
data.detailed_description: As a secret agent, you infiltrate the casino to perform a secret mission and interact with various characters. Whether you can ultimately complete the mission depends on your gambling skills
data.about_the_game: As a secret agent, you infiltrate the casino to perform a secret mission and interact with various characters. Whether you can ultimately complete the mission depends on your gambling skills
data.short_description: Casino, money, beauty girls, desire, everything is superficial, hidden behind a huge conspiracy
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64Bits
  • 處理器: Intel Core™ Duo or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 | AMD Radeon HD 7950
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 11 Compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64-bit | Windows 8 64-bit | Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2500K | AMD Ryzen 5 1400
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 | AMD Radeon RX 570
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 11 Compatible

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 64Bits
  • Processor: Intel Core™ Duo or faster
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 | AMD Radeon HD 7950
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX 11 Compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 64-bit | Windows 8 64-bit | Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2500K | AMD Ryzen 5 1400
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 | AMD Radeon RX 570
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX 11 Compatible
